headline: Should Berkshire’s New Stake and Higher Dividend Require Action From Domino's Pizza (DPZ) Investors?
summary: Domino's Pizza, Inc. reported past fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of US$1,535.74 million and net income of US$181.64 million, alongside a 15% increase to its quarterly dividend and completion of a US$540.46 million share buyback program covering 1,214,125 shares. Investor attention has also focused on Berkshire Hathaway disclosing a position in Domino’s, reinforcing interest in the company’s franchise-heavy, cash-generating model and its ability to return cash to shareholders through dividends...

Investor attention has also focused on Berkshire Hathaway disclosing a position in Domino’s, reinforcing interest in the company’s franchise-heavy, cash-generating model and its ability to return cash to shareholders through dividends...
